apcm_spotlight.headline: APCM Is Here: CMS's Simplified Path to Care Management Revenue
apcm_spotlight.body: No time tracking. Broader patient eligibility. Two simple codes. Learn how Advanced Primary Care Management changes care management billing.

apcm.title: Advanced Primary Care Management (APCM)
apcm.description: Advanced Primary Care Management (APCM) is CMS's 2025 replacement for fragmented care management billing. Two codes, no time tracking, and broader patient eligibility -- APCM reduces administrative burden while expanding your care management revenue.
apcm.hero_headline: APCM Is Here: Simpler Billing, Broader Patient Reach
apcm.hero_subtext: CMS's new Advanced Primary Care Management eliminates time tracking, expands eligibility to patients with just one chronic condition, and pairs with RPM for maximum reimbursement.

what_is.title: What is APCM?
what_is.desc: Advanced Primary Care Management (APCM) is a new CMS care management program effective January 1, 2025 under the CY2025 Physician Fee Schedule Final Rule. It replaces the fragmented CCM/PCM/BHI code system with a simplified two-tier structure.

tier1.title: Tier 1 (G0556)
tier1.desc: For patients with 1 or more chronic conditions lasting 3+ months. Expanded eligibility compared to CCM's 2+ condition requirement.

tier2.title: Tier 2 (G0557)
tier2.desc: For patients with 2+ chronic conditions lasting 12+ months, or a single high-risk chronic condition requiring comprehensive management.

vs_ccm.title: CCM vs APCM: What Changes?
vs_ccm.desc: APCM eliminates time tracking, simplifies billing to 2 codes, and expands eligibility to patients with just 1 chronic condition. Whether you stay with CCM or transition to APCM, HicareNet supports both.

billing.title: APCM Billing Overview
billing.simultaneous_rpm: Bill APCM + RPM simultaneously for maximum revenue
billing.monthly_billing: Simple monthly billing per calendar month
billing.note: APCM uses just two codes with no time tracking requirement. Bill monthly per patient. Cannot bill simultaneously with CCM (99490-99489) but CAN bill with RPM (99453-99458), AWV (G0438/G0439), and E/M codes. Verify current rates with CMS.

apcm.feature1: No time tracking required -- eliminate CCM's biggest administrative burden
apcm.feature2: AI-powered Tier 1/Tier 2 patient classification based on ICD-10 codes
apcm.feature3: Simultaneous APCM + RPM billing on a single platform
apcm.feature4: Multilingual APCM consent and care coordination (EN/KR/ES)
apcm.outcome1: Expand your eligible patient pool with Tier 1 (1+ chronic condition)
apcm.outcome2: Earn $70-135 per patient per month with simplified billing
apcm.outcome3: Reduce administrative burden by eliminating minute-by-minute time tracking
apcm.cta_guide: Download CCM vs APCM Decision Guide

cta_section.heading: Ready to Simplify Your Care Management Billing?
cta_section.body: Whether you are transitioning from CCM or starting fresh with APCM, HicareNet supports both programs on a single platform. See how APCM can expand your patient reach and reduce administrative overhead.

workflow.title: How APCM Works
workflow.step1_desc: ICD-10 review, Medicare Part B eligibility check, Tier 1 vs Tier 2 classification
workflow.step2_desc: Explain APCM service, obtain verbal or written consent, document in EHR
workflow.step3_desc: Health assessment, condition-specific goals, medication management, specialist coordination
workflow.step4_desc: Patient monitoring, care plan review, communication -- no minute-by-minute time tracking needed
workflow.step5_desc: Service summary, tier classification documentation, monthly G0556/G0557 claim submission

hra.title: Health Risk Assessment (HRA)
hra.description: Health Risk Assessments are more than a Medicare checkbox. HicareNet's digital HRA platform identifies high-risk patients, recommends care pathways, and feeds enrollment pipelines for RPM, CCM, and APCM -- automatically and in three languages.
hra.hero_headline: Turn Every Health Assessment into a Care Management Opportunity
hra.hero_subtext: Digital multilingual Health Risk Assessments identify patients for RPM, CCM, and APCM enrollment -- turning a single screening into a care management revenue pipeline.

pipeline.title: Your Patient Discovery Engine
pipeline.desc: HRA is the gateway that identifies patients for high-revenue care management services. Every assessment result maps to an enrollment opportunity.
pipeline.rpm_link: Hypertension/Diabetes risk identified -- enroll in RPM (~$147/month)
pipeline.ccm_link: 2+ chronic conditions discovered -- enroll in CCM/APCM (~$64-135/month)
pipeline.apcm_link: HRA results support APCM Tier 1/Tier 2 classification

multilingual.title: Multilingual Digital Assessments
multilingual.desc: Culturally adapted health risk assessments available in English, Korean, and Spanish. Validated screening tools including PHQ-9 Korean version.

digital.title: Digital-First HRA
digital.privisit: Pre-visit digital distribution via patient app reduces in-office time by 15-20 minutes
digital.voice_guided: Voice-guided assessments for elderly patients with limited literacy

hra.feature1: Identify patients for high-revenue services -- HRA results automatically flag RPM, CCM, and APCM enrollment candidates
hra.feature2: Multilingual digital assessments -- PHQ-9, GAD-7, Falls Risk, and SDOH screening in English, Korean, and Spanish
hra.feature3: Pre-visit digital distribution -- patients complete HRA via mobile app before their visit, reducing in-office time
hra.feature4: AI-powered risk scoring -- automatic risk stratification with care pathway recommendations
hra.outcome1: Unlock $2,000+ in annual per-patient revenue through downstream RPM/CCM/APCM enrollment
hra.outcome2: Boost AWV completion rates with pre-visit digital HRA distribution
hra.outcome3: Identify high-risk patients automatically for immediate care management enrollment

cta_section.heading: Start Identifying Your Highest-Value Patients Today
cta_section.body: HicareNet's digital HRA turns every assessment into an actionable care plan. See how multilingual, AI-powered Health Risk Assessments can fill your RPM and CCM enrollment pipeline.

billing.note: While standalone HRA reimbursement (96160/96161) is modest, HRA's primary value is as the gateway to high-revenue services: RPM, CCM, and APCM. One HRA can identify patients eligible for services generating $1,700+ in annual revenue.

billing.title: RPM Billing Codes & Reimbursement
billing.code_99453: 99453 -- Initial device setup and patient education (once per patient)
billing.code_99454: 99454 -- Device supply with daily recording, per 30 days (16-day rule)
billing.code_99457: 99457 -- Treatment management, first 20 min interactive communication
billing.note: RPM requires data transmission on at least 16 of 30 days (99454). Interactive two-way communication is required for 99457/99458. RPM can be billed simultaneously with CCM, APCM, and AWV codes. Cannot bill with 99091 in the same month.

related.ccm: Maximize revenue: Bill RPM + CCM simultaneously for up to ~$211/patient/month
related.apcm: RPM + APCM: The new revenue combination for 2025
related.awv: Discover RPM-eligible patients during Annual Wellness Visits
related.hra: Health Risk Assessments identify patients who benefit most from RPM
related.vbc: RPM data directly improves your HEDIS blood pressure and diabetes measures
related.fhir: Coming H1 2026: Seamless EHR integration via FHIR R4

cta_section.heading: See How RPM Reduces Readmissions and Increases Revenue
cta_section.body: From device setup to billing -- HicareNet RPM supports the full workflow on one platform. Connect 120+ devices, engage patients in their language, and start generating Medicare reimbursement.

billing.title: CCM Billing Codes & Reimbursement
billing.note: CCM requires minute-by-minute time tracking and 24/7 patient access to the care team. An electronic care plan must be stored in the EHR. Cannot bill simultaneously with APCM (G0556) or PCM (99424-99427). CAN bill simultaneously with RPM (99453-99458).

apcm_transition.title: Considering the Move to APCM?
apcm_transition.desc: CMS launched APCM in 2025 as a simplified alternative to CCM. No time tracking, broader patient eligibility, and two simple codes. HicareNet supports both CCM and APCM -- compare options for your patient panel and transition when you are ready.

related.rpm: Bill RPM + CCM together for maximum per-patient revenue
related.apcm: Considering APCM? Compare CCM vs APCM for your practice
related.awv: AWV identifies CCM-eligible patients with 2+ chronic conditions
related.hra: HRA results feed directly into CCM care plans
related.vbc: CCM is a cornerstone of Value-Based Care quality improvement

cta_section.heading: Ready to Manage Chronic Conditions in Your Patients' Language?
cta_section.body: HicareNet is the only CCM platform with native care coordination in English, Korean, and Spanish. See how automated time tracking and multilingual support reduce burden and improve engagement.

billing.title: AWV Billing Codes & Reimbursement
billing.code_g0438: G0438 -- Initial Annual Wellness Visit (first AWV ever)
billing.code_g0402: G0402 -- Initial Preventive Physical Exam / IPPE (once per lifetime)
billing.no_patient_cost: No patient cost -- AWV is free under the Affordable Care Act
billing.note: Patients pay nothing for AWV (ACA preventive service). Can serve as CCM/APCM initiating visit. Same-day E/M billing allowed with Modifier 25 for separate clinical problems. Minimum 12-month interval between AWVs.

pipeline.title: AWV: Your Care Management Gateway
pipeline.rpm_link: Discover patients with chronic conditions for RPM enrollment (~$1,764/year)
pipeline.ccm_link: Identify patients with 2+ conditions for CCM/APCM enrollment (~$768-1,620/year)
pipeline.apcm_link: Discover APCM-eligible patients during Annual Wellness Visits
pipeline.revenue_potential: [ESTIMATED] One AWV visit ($118-175) can unlock $2,500+ in annual per-patient revenue

recall.title: Automated AWV Recall Management
recall.desc: 12-month automated recall notifications to maximize AWV completion rates across your patient panel

cta_section.heading: Start Turning Wellness Visits into Care Management Revenue
cta_section.body: HicareNet's AWV solution automates every required component and connects patients to RPM, CCM, and APCM services. See how digital, multilingual AWV workflows increase completion rates and downstream revenue.

what_is.title: What is Value-Based Care?
what_is.desc: Value-Based Care is not a separate service -- it is the outcome of everything your practice does with RPM, CCM, APCM, and AWV data. HicareNet connects the dots: every blood pressure reading, every care plan update, and every wellness visit feeds directly into your quality scores and financial performance.

dual_revenue.title: The Dual Revenue Strategy
dual_revenue.ffs: Earn immediate revenue from RPM/CCM/APCM fee-for-service billing
dual_revenue.incentives: Simultaneously build toward VBC shared savings, MIPS bonuses, and Stars quality payments

models.title: VBC Models We Support
models.mips: MIPS -- Merit-based Incentive Payment System (+/-9% Medicare adjustment)
models.mssp: MSSP -- Medicare Shared Savings Program (40-75% shared savings)
models.aco_reach: ACO REACH -- Equity-focused total cost of care model
models.stars: MA Stars -- Quality bonus payments for 4+ star Medicare Advantage plans

quality.title: Quality Measures HicareNet Impacts
quality.hedis_bp: Controlling High Blood Pressure (HEDIS/Stars) -- powered by RPM monitoring
quality.hedis_diabetes: Diabetes HbA1c Control (HEDIS/Stars) -- powered by RPM glucose data
quality.readmission: All-Cause Readmission (HEDIS/MIPS) -- reduced by RPM + CCM/APCM
quality.awv_rate: AWV Completion Rate (Stars) -- driven by AWV/HRA digital workflow
quality.medication: Medication Adherence (Stars) -- supported by CCM/APCM management

equity.title: Health Equity & Patient Experience
equity.desc: Multilingual care in English, Korean, and Spanish improves CAHPS patient experience scores and meets ACO REACH health equity requirements.
